Klasse UserRegisterRequest

java.lang.Object
at.jku.se.dto.request.UserRegisterRequest
public class UserRegisterRequest extends Object
Request body for registering a new user (FR-01).

  • Feldübersicht

    Felder
    Modifikator und Typ
    Feld
    Beschreibung
    @NotBlank @Email(message="Must be a valid email address") String
    email
    Email address of the new account.
    @NotBlank @Size(min=6,message="Password must be at least 6 characters") String
    password
    Initial plain-text password for the new account.
    @NotNull UserRole
    role
    Role assigned to the new account, defaults to MEMBER.

  • Konstruktorübersicht

    Konstruktoren
    Konstruktor
    Beschreibung
    UserRegisterRequest()
    Default constructor for deserialization frameworks.

    • email

      @NotBlank @Email(message="Must be a valid email address") public @NotBlank @Email(message="Must be a valid email address") String email

    • password

      @NotBlank @Size(min=6, message="Password must be at least 6 characters") public @NotBlank @Size(min=6,message="Password must be at least 6 characters") String password
      Initial plain-text password for the new account.

    • role

      @NotNull public @NotNull UserRole role
      Role assigned to the new account, defaults to MEMBER.
